subcodes.first_line: God beareth witness that there is none other God but Him, and He Who is seated upon the Throne is verily the Dawning-Place of signs and the Source [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی استقر علی العرش انه لمشرق الایات و مطلع
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @call to action, @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice, @rejection, opposition and persecution
